title: TELITE 10 Pcs Key Tags with Labels, 10 Colors Key Fobs with Split Rings for Keys, Key Rings with Tags for Luggage, Pet Name and Office Key Labels, Writable Paper Card Stick Tags Brand: TELITE

✔️𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐭 & 𝐋𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭: Measure 4.8 cm L x 2.2 cm W and weigh 1g. Keep the keys clear and organized, preventing keys from going missing or becoming muddled up. Perfect to be carried around with no extra burden or bulk.

✔️𝐋𝐚𝐛𝐞𝐥 𝐖𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐰 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧: Plastic-colored key tags come with a key ring and removable paper insert, which are great-easy to take the paper out to label and there is a clear cover that protects the paper insert from damage.

✔️𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐔𝐬𝐞: Open the cover and take out the blank piece of paper, write it, and put it back in place after the ink is dry to avoid smearing. Please take it carefully.
description: Product Description From Manufacturer Key tags are an essential tool for keeping track of keys and other important items. They provide a convenient way to identify and organize keys, making it easier to find the right one when needed. Key tags with labels come in a variety of shapes, sizes, and materials, allowing you to choose the best option for your needs. Say Goodbye to lost keys Keep your keys organized and easy to find with our stylish key rings with tags. These durable key tags are made from high-quality material and feature a strong metal ring that securely holds your keys. Choose a variety of colors to find the perfect key fobs for you. With our key fobs with labels, you will never have to search for your keys again. 10 Eye-Assorted Colors You will have 10 assorted eye-catching colors Red, Orange, Light Blue, Black, Purple, Green, Hot pink, Blue, Yellow, And White of these eye catching tags. Light Weight Tags These plastic key tags are made from a tear and bend-resistant PE material. They will not harm your clothes or hand when you carry them around, and they are extremely light in weight Pet Tags Our personalized dog tags with rings. This unique pet tag is a great way to mark your pet's ID and with our included key ring they're also super easy to attach to leashes, collars, and harnesses. Wide Usage Personalize your keys with our key fobs. They are perfect for keys and luggage, house, warehouse, or hotel keys. Sturdy and reliable, plastic key tags are widely used to identify home office hotel keys, luggage, bags, etc. They can also be used as pet ID tags, a must for homes and offices.
